---
title: "unnest_flixpatrol_response"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `unnest_flixpatrol_response()`

Unnest a FlixPatrol API Response

## Usage

```r
unnest_flixpatrol_response(data_lst)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `data_lst` | List. The 'data' element from a parsed API response. |

## Value

A wide tibble with all nested columns expanded.

## Description

Shared helper that flattens the nested JSON structure returned by most
FlixPatrol list endpoints into a wide, analysis-ready tibble.
